Sign up
Realtime voice, video, and AI at global scale
Build ultra low latency conversations. Global WebRTC infrastructure and enterprise reliability since 2016. Daily is the team behind Pipecat, the 100% open source framework for conversational AI.
Start Building
Docs
[
PLATFORM
]
Pipecat
Pipecat is a vendor-neutral open source orchestration framework for realtime voice and multimodal AI agents.
Start building
Pipecat Cloud
Deploy voice AI agents built with Pipecat on Daily's global infrastructure.
Sign up
Daily Infrastructure
Run realtime calls on Daily's WebRTC global infrastructure. Deploy Pipecat-built agents on Daily transport. Our platform also supports building and hosting human/human calls.
Pipecat Transport
More about video integration
[
INFRASTRUCTURE
]
Scale with Daily's Global Mesh Network
Since 2016, our infrastructure and WebRTC-native SDKs deliver the best realtime experiences on every network, for every device, everywhere in the world.

Daily's team includes authors of WebRTC standards, video technology pioneers, and engineers with deep experience in codecs, realtime networking, and infrastructure.
LEARN MORE
13ms
Median first-hop latency
Lowest latency realtime video and audio.
75+
Global points of presence
Battle-tested multi-cloud architecture.
4×
Better video resolution
Compared to Agora in real-world network tests.
2×
Faster connection times
Optimized connection establishment and routing.
[
ENTERPRISE
]
Enterprise-grade security
Comprehensive data security, compliance, and uptime SLAs. Daily offers true end-to-end encryption, provides signed HIPAA BAAs, and operates under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.
VISIT OUR SECURITY CENTER
99.99%
Service uptime
SOC-2
GDPR
HIPAA
[
Contributions
]
Open Source
Daily is a
W3C WebRTC Working Group
member and maintains
Pipecat
, an open-source framework for voice and multimodal AI.
We also contribute to several open-source projects, including
Mediasoup
and
GStreamer
.
pipecat-ai/pipecat
Python
12584

Get Started
]
The best realtime experiences run on Daily

See our pricing

Changelog | Daily real-time video and audio API

Changelog

⌘
K
Log in
Sign up
Home
Changelog
Changelog
Daily supports versions of
daily-js
and
react-native-daily-js
released in the past six months.
We recommend updating your Daily libraries regularly to access our latest features and to ensure the version you are using is currently supported.
Recent updates and improvements from our engineering team.
April 29 2026
#077 - 2026-04-29
daily-react 0.25.0 adds multiple concurrent recording and streaming instances, daily-python 0.28.0 enables ABR by default and adds screen share custom tracks, plus new SIP dial-in/dial-out event fields and VCS streaming improvements.
March 29 2026
#076 - 2026-03-29
Smaller call-machine bundle (~2MB less), VCS layout animations, configurable max API keys, and daily-js 0.81.0 minimum version bump.
February 24 2026
#075 - 2026-02-24
DTMF tone support for SIP calls, raw-tracks recording improvements, Krisp SDK lazy loading, and webhook event ID timestamps.
January 29 2026
#074 - 2026-01-29
Recording dataOutputs for transcripts and chat, cloud-audio-only recording, laptop lid session handling, CPU load detection improvements, and Kamailio call transfer support.
December 19 2025
#073 - 2025-12-19
Recording-synchronized transcripts, gapless audio for raw-tracks, CPU warning notifications, and Prebuilt session resume and background effects fixes.
November 20 2025
#072 - 2025-11-20
SIP codec negotiation, call transfer fixes, recording enhancements, and Prebuilt breakout room and screen sharing fixes.
October 30 2025
#071 - 2025-10-30
Narrower CSP for video backgrounds, audio-only recording property, dynamic SIP dial-in endpoints, and telephony and recording fixes.
September 23 2025
#070 - 2025-09-23
Phone extension support for dial-out, Android 16KB page size compatibility, auto-start recording reliability, and new Picture-in-Picture events.
August 26 2025
#069 - 2025-08-26
Chrome 140 and Firefox 142 compatibility fixes, pre-join screen sharing, Krisp CPU overload handling, telephony improvements, and Prebuilt accessibility updates.
July 28 2025
#068 - 2025-07-28
New network status callbacks, improved telephony error handling, and platform-wide stability fixes.
June 29 2025
#067 - 2025-06-29
SIP/PSTN join-time permissions, React Native New Architecture support, recording and telephony improvements.
May 31 2025
#066 - 2025-05-31
Meeting move aware recording and streaming, new call transfer webhooks, improved telephony features, and platform-wide bug fixes.
April 30 2025
#065 - 2025-04-30
Stability fixes for ejection logic and network states, Python custom audio tracks, enhanced recording webhooks, improved telephony features, and performance diagnostics for slow joins.
March 30 2025
#064 - 2025-03-30
New canReceive permission, dynamic track constraints, revamped network stats, enhanced telephony features (caller ID, SIP fixes), improved platform stability and compatibility (reconnection, ICE, and more), and security updates.
January 31 2025
#063 - 2025-01-31
New transcription webhooks, better multi-instance recording support, improved telephony features, platform-wide bug fixes, and strengthened SDK reliability.
November 25 2024
#062 - 2024-11-25
Improved recording recovery, support for virtual background and custom audio tracks on mobile SDKs, and various platform-wide improvements.
October 17 2024
#061 - 2024-10-17
Lots of updates in the last 3 months. Live transcriptions, PSTN and SIP, streaming and recording.
July 5, 2024
#060 - 2024-07-05
daily-js improves the precall network test method and adds support for multiple call instances.
June 5, 2024
#059 - 2024-06-05
Daily’s client SDKs add support for a number of top feature requests as well as continue to add support for phone and SIP use cases.
May 1, 2024
#058 - 2024-05-01
Daily Adaptive Bitrate comes to daily-ios, daily-android, react-native-daily-js and is now the default setting for daily-js 1:1 calls.
March 19, 2024
#057 - 2024-03-19
Daily’s client SDKs add a number of new features including camera zoom and flashlight control on Android, VAD on Python, and two new participant events for webhooks.
February 22, 2024
#056 - 2024-02-22
Daily Prebuilt and daily-js now support Adaptive Bitrate, which automatically optimizes the quality of your calls.
January 25, 2024
#055 - 2024-01-25
The latest update adds dial-in and dial-out support to Daily’s SDKs
December 22, 2023
#054 - 2023-12-22
All SDKs add native real-time transcription support and background blur and effects are now GA for daily-js.
December 6, 2023
#053 - 2023-12-06
A big release with a number of new features and improvements, including daily-ios screen sharing support and daily-android transcription support.
November 9, 2023
#052 - 2023-11-09
daily-python adds support for capturing individual audio tracks from a call and daily-js gets more call metrics improvements.
October 17, 2023
#051 - 2023-10-17
The latest update includes improved call metrics for daily-js and added screen share support for daily-android.
September 25, 2023
#050 - 2023-09-25
The latest update includes HEVC recordings, new REST APIs, and plenty of internal improvements and bugfixes.
September 15, 2023
#049 - 2023-09-15
Client releases for Web, React Native, iOS, Android, and Daily React!
August 28, 2023
#048 - 2023-08-28
The latest updates include new precall methods and new audio level observer methods.
July 28, 2023
#047 - 2023-07-28
Release highlights for daily-android and daily-ios 0.9.0 and daily-react 0.11.0.
July 25, 2023
#046 - 2023-07-25
react-native-daily-js gets screen sharing support and both react-native-daily-js and daily-js get Advanced Network Controls.
June 30, 2023
#045 - 2023-06-30
Daily makes improvements to how local devices are accessed via shortcuts.
June 7, 2023
#044 - 2023-06-07
daily-js gets new screen sharing controls 🛠️
May 17, 2023
#043 - 2023-05-17
Daily’s iOS and Android mobile SDKs are now generally available! Check out the changelog to learn more.
May 01, 2023
#042 - 2023-05-01
The latest updates to Daily’s real-time audio and video APIs, including a new API to configure your send settings, improvements to Daily Prebuilt’s breakout features, and lots of bugfixes.
April 03, 2023
#041 - 2023-04-03
The latest updates to Daily’s real-time audio and video APIs, including new features like noise cancellation, a CPU load event, breakout rooms in Daily Prebuilt, and a new Integrations API in Daily Prebuilt.
March 15, 2023
#040 - 2023-03-15
The latest updates to Daily’s real-time audio and video APIs
February 28, 2023
#039 - 2023-02-28
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including several API improvements, performance improvements, and bugfixes.
February 1, 2023
#038 - 2023-02-01
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API.
January 18, 2023
#037 - 2023-01-18
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including new REST API endpoints, improvements to daily-react, and longer streaming durations.
December 23, 2022
#036 - 2022-12-23
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API.
December 6, 2022
#035 - 2022-12-06
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including the ability to add custom tracks to your Daily call.
November 14, 2022
#034 - 2022-11-14
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including a new Daily React library to build custom video and audio experiences.
October 17, 2022
#033 - 2022-10-17
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including the ability to record individual media tracks to your own AWS S3 bucket.
October 04, 2022
#032 - 2022-10-04
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including new live streaming, recording, and a new REST API endpoint to send app messages.
September 26, 2022
#031 - 2022-09-26
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including bugfixes and VCS improvements.
September 15, 2022
#030 - 2022-09-15
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including a new permissions system and bugfixes.
August 22, 2022
#029 - 2022-08-22
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including bugfixes and streaming improvements.
July 29, 2022
#028 - 2022-07-29
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including performance and security improvements.
July 07, 2022
#027 - 2022-07-07
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including improvements to device management methods.
June 16, 2022
#026 - 2022-06-16
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including a new pricing structure and improved large meeting support.
May 17, 2022
#025 - 2022-05-17
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including new react-native-daily-js support.
April 14, 2022
#024 - 2022-04-14
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including several bugfixes.
March 30, 2022
#023 - 2022-03-30
Introducing Daily Prebuilt's (beta) Picture in Picture controls! Plus, lots of configuration and API improvements.
Feb 15, 2022
#022 - 2022-02-15
Introducing server-side recordings in React Native Daily JS, and virtual backgrounds in Daily JS.
Jan 18, 2022
#021 - 2022-01-18
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API, including gifs in Daily Prebuilt chat and a new daily-js error type.
Oct 28, 2021
#020 - 2021-10-28
The latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API include background blur for Daily Prebuilt and more.
Sep 22, 2021
#019 - 2021-09-22
Introducing beta Deepgram transcription, a show-local-video-changed event, getNetworkTopology() method, and more in the latest updates to the Daily real-time audio and video API.
Aug 17, 2021
#018 - 2021-08-17
Control how you receive video and audio tracks on a call, customize the number of participant videos displayed, and more updates to the Daily real-time audio and video WebRTC API.
Aug 03, 2021
#017 - 2021-08-03
The latest improvements, including color theming, to Daily Prebuilt, a ready-to-use video chat app built on WebRTC that developers can plug into their websites and apps.
Jul 07, 2021
#016 - 2021-07-07
The latest improvements to Daily Prebuilt, a ready-to-use video chat app built on WebRTC that developers can plug into their websites and apps.
May 28, 2021
#015 - 2021-05-28
The latest engineering updates from the Daily real time video and audio API team.
May 13, 2021
#014 - 2021-05-13
The latest engineering updates from the Daily real-time video and audio API team.
Apr 19, 2021
#013 - 2021-04-19
The latest engineering updates from the Daily real-time video and audio API team.
Apr 05, 2021
#012 - 2021-04-05
The latest engineering updates from the Daily real-time video and audio API team.
Mar 09, 2021
#011 - 2021-03-09
The latest engineering updates from the Daily real-time video and audio API team.
Feb 22, 2021
#010 - 2021-02-22
The latest engineering updates from the Daily real-time video and audio API team.
Jan 08, 2021
#009 - 2021-01-08
The latest engineering updates from the Daily real-time video and audio API team.
Dec 10, 2020
#008 - 2020-12-10
The latest engineering updates from the Daily real-time video and audio API team.
Nov 11, 2020
#007 - 2020-11-23
Dark mode! Events timeline! ...and so much more. Click to see what we've been up to at Daily.
Oct 23, 2020
#006 - 2020-10-23
Read about a new /logs endpoint, updated dashboard, and react-native-daily-js in this week's changelog.
Sep 17, 2020
#005 - 2020-09-17
The latest engineering updates from the Daily real-time video and audio API team.
Aug 11, 2020
#004 - 2020-08-11
We're back after some well deserved time off! The last few weeks have been focused on call scaling, stability and behind-the-scenes work in preparation for bigger features that we'll soon be sharing.
Aug 03, 2020
#003 - 2020-08-03
The focus of the latest release of the dashboard is providing insight into how you are interacting with the API. If you head to your dashboard, you will now see API logs!
Jul 07, 2020
#002 - 2020-07-20
The latest engineering updates from the Daily real-time video and audio API team.
Jul 17, 2020
#001 - 2020-07-17
The latest engineering updates from the Daily real-time video and audio API team.
Built worldwide

hits.title: Getting my daily news from a dot matrix printer
Show HN: I've been writing daily TILs for a year
Why we ignore thousands of daily car crashes
Feds Threatened to Fine Yahoo $250K Daily for Not Complying with NSA's PRISM
An updated daily front page of The New York Times as artwork on your wall
Claude Code daily benchmarks for degradation tracking
Ask HN: What programming blogs do you read daily?

analysis.name: Daily
analysis.tagline: Realtime voice, video, and AI at global scale
analysis.value_proposition: Global WebRTC infrastructure and open-source AI agent framework (Pipecat) for developers building ultra-low-latency voice, video, and conversational AI applications.
analysis.ideal_customer: Developer teams building real-time voice/video applications and AI voice agents, from startups to enterprises requiring HIPAA/SOC-2 compliance.

features.name: video sdk
features.description: Client SDKs for building fully custom video and audio call experiences
features.evidence_quote: Create custom video and audio layouts with Daily's Client SDKs.

features.name: prebuilt ui
features.description: Drop-in embeddable video chat widget for adding calls to apps/sites in minutes
features.evidence_quote: Add video calls to your app or website in minutes with Daily Prebuilt.

features.name: audio-only calls
features.description: Multi-platform audio-only community and call support without video
features.evidence_quote: Build multi-platform audio-only communities with the Daily API.

features.name: live streaming
features.description: Live streaming of calls and content to external destinations

features.name: recording
features.description: Cloud recording of video and audio calls with composite and raw-tracks options
features.evidence_quote: multiple concurrent recording and streaming instances

features.name: raw-tracks recording
features.description: Record individual participant audio/video tracks separately for post-processing

features.name: cloud-audio-only recording
features.description: Record audio-only stream to cloud without capturing video

features.name: hevc recordings
features.description: HEVC (H.265) encoded recordings for better compression quality

features.name: recording data outputs
features.description: Export transcripts and chat messages alongside recording files
features.evidence_quote: Recording dataOutputs for transcripts and chat

features.name: recording-synchronized transcripts
features.description: Transcripts time-synchronized to recording playback timestamps

features.name: screen sharing
features.description: Screen share support across web, iOS, Android, and React Native including pre-join

features.name: pipecat open source framework
features.description: Vendor-neutral OSS orchestration framework for realtime voice and multimodal AI agents
features.evidence_quote: Pipecat is a vendor-neutral open source orchestration framework for realtime voice and multimodal AI agents.

features.name: pipecat cloud
features.description: Managed cloud deployment platform for Pipecat-built voice AI agents on Daily's infrastructure
features.evidence_quote: Deploy voice AI agents built with Pipecat on Daily's global infrastructure.

features.name: pipecat flows
features.description: Flow-based orchestration layer for composing Pipecat AI agent pipelines

features.name: smart turn model
features.description: AI turn-taking model for natural back-and-forth voice agent conversations

features.name: smallwebrtc
features.description: Lightweight WebRTC implementation for constrained or embedded environments

features.name: gemini 2.0 sdk integration
features.description: Pre-built SDK integration with Google Gemini 2.0 for voice AI agent pipelines

features.name: openai audio model integration
features.description: Pre-built integration with OpenAI audio models for voice AI via Pipecat

features.name: sip dial-in
features.description: Phone dial-in to calls via SIP/PSTN with dynamic endpoint configuration

features.name: sip dial-out
features.description: Outbound phone calling from calls via SIP/PSTN with caller ID support

features.name: call transfer
features.description: SIP/PSTN call transfer with Kamailio support and transfer event webhooks

features.name: dtmf tone support
features.description: DTMF tone sending/receiving for IVR and phone system interactions over SIP
features.evidence_quote: DTMF tone support for SIP calls

features.name: sip codec negotiation
features.description: Audio codec negotiation for SIP call compatibility with third-party systems

features.name: phone extension support
features.description: Dial phone extensions during outbound SIP/PSTN calls

features.name: caller id
features.description: Set outbound caller ID for PSTN dial-out calls
features.evidence_quote: enhanced telephony features (caller ID, SIP fixes)

features.name: real-time transcription
features.description: Live speech-to-text transcription during calls delivered via webhooks
features.evidence_quote: All SDKs add native real-time transcription support

features.name: transcription webhooks
features.description: Webhook delivery of transcription events and segments in real time
features.evidence_quote: New transcription webhooks, better multi-instance recording support

features.name: background blur and effects
features.description: Virtual background images and blur for video calls, GA on web and mobile
features.evidence_quote: background blur and effects are now GA for daily-js

features.name: noise cancellation
features.description: AI-powered noise cancellation via Krisp SDK with lazy loading and CPU overload handling

features.name: adaptive bitrate
features.description: Automatic video quality optimization based on network conditions across all platforms
features.evidence_quote: Daily Adaptive Bitrate comes to daily-ios, daily-android, react-native-daily-js and is now the default

features.name: end-to-end encryption
features.description: True end-to-end encryption for calls

features.name: hipaa compliance
features.description: Signed HIPAA Business Associate Agreements for healthcare use cases

features.name: soc-2 compliance
features.description: SOC-2 compliance certification

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: GDPR data protection compliance under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework
features.evidence_quote: operates under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework

features.name: rest api
features.description: REST API for programmatically creating and managing rooms, tokens, and domain config
features.evidence_quote: Programmatically create rooms, tokens and more.

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Event webhooks for call, recording, transcription, and telephony lifecycle events

features.name: meeting tokens
features.description: Signed tokens for controlling per-participant access and permissions per room
features.evidence_quote: Comparing Daily API configs: domain, room, tokens

features.name: participant permissions
features.description: Granular join-time and dynamic participant permissions including canReceive and track constraints
features.evidence_quote: New canReceive permission, dynamic track constraints

features.name: breakout rooms
features.description: Sub-rooms for splitting participants into separate group discussions
features.evidence_quote: Prebuilt breakout room and screen sharing fixes

features.name: vcs (video component system)
features.description: Layout composition system for streaming with animations and custom visual layouts

features.name: react sdk
features.description: React hooks and components library (daily-react) for building video/audio UI
features.evidence_quote: daily-react 0.25.0 adds multiple concurrent recording and streaming instances

features.name: react native sdk
features.description: React Native SDK with New Architecture support for cross-platform mobile apps

features.name: ios sdk
features.description: Native iOS SDK for video and audio calls including screen sharing

features.name: android sdk
features.description: Native Android SDK with camera zoom, flashlight control, screen sharing, and 16KB page support
features.evidence_quote: camera zoom and flashlight control on Android

features.name: python sdk
features.description: Python SDK for server-side call bots and AI agents with custom audio/video tracks
features.evidence_quote: daily-python adds support for capturing individual audio tracks from a call

features.name: vad (voice activity detection)
features.description: Voice activity detection for Python SDK and AI agent pipeline integrations

features.name: picture-in-picture
features.description: Picture-in-Picture video display mode with JavaScript event callbacks

features.name: precall network diagnostics
features.description: Pre-call network quality test to assess connection before joining
features.evidence_quote: daily-js improves the precall network test method

features.name: call quality metrics
features.description: Revamped real-time network stats and call quality diagnostics

features.name: cpu load detection
features.description: Detect CPU overload conditions and surface warnings to maintain call quality

features.name: multiple call instances
features.description: Support for multiple simultaneous call instances within the same application
features.evidence_quote: daily-js improves the precall network test method and adds support for multiple call instances

features.name: session resume
features.description: Automatic resume of interrupted call sessions without re-joining
features.evidence_quote: Prebuilt session resume and background effects fixes

features.name: global mesh network
features.description: 75+ global points of presence with multi-cloud architecture for 13ms median latency
features.evidence_quote: 75+ Global points of presence. Battle-tested multi-cloud architecture.

features.name: configurable api key limits
features.description: Configure maximum number of API keys per domain/account

features.name: accessibility features
features.description: WCAG accessibility improvements for Prebuilt UI components

features.name: voicemail detection agent
features.description: AI-powered voicemail detection for outbound call automation via Pipecat
features.evidence_quote: Building a voicemail detection agent with Pipecat & Daily

differentiators: 13ms median first-hop latency — lowest latency realtime video and audio
4x better video resolution compared to Agora in real-world network tests
Daily created and maintains Pipecat, the 100% open source conversational AI framework
Vendor-neutral Pipecat framework works with any AI provider (OpenAI, Gemini, etc.)
W3C WebRTC Working Group member — team includes authors of WebRTC standards
Enterprise reliability since 2016 — longest track record in the WebRTC API space
75+ global points of presence with battle-tested multi-cloud architecture

tiers.name: Video SDK
tiers.headline_inclusions: Human-to-human video and audio calls; 10,000 free minutes/month included, usage-based beyond

tiers.name: Pipecat Cloud
tiers.headline_inclusions: Deploy Pipecat voice AI agents; usage-based pricing, completely flexible stack

tiers.name: WebRTC Infrastructure
tiers.headline_inclusions: Raw WebRTC infrastructure access; usage-based pricing with discounts at scale

pricing.notes: Three separate pricing tracks: Video SDK (minute-based with 10k free/month), Pipecat Cloud (usage-based AI agent hosting), WebRTC Infrastructure (raw usage with volume discounts). Specific per-minute/per-unit rates not disclosed on public pricing page. Enterprise includes HIPAA BAA and E2E encryption.
